heading: Purchase
introSaleCreated: Thank you for your purchase. The following summary reflects your agreement with {companyName}.
closingSaleCreated: You can review your documents and payment status in the client portal.
contractAttachedNote: Your purchase contract is attached to this email.
introInst3: This is a reminder that installment {installmentNumber} for your purchase at {companyName} is due in three days (due date: {dueDate}).
closingInst3: Please arrange payment before the due date.
introInst1: Installment {installmentNumber} for your purchase at {companyName} is due tomorrow (due date: {dueDate}).
closingInst1: Please complete payment if you have not already.
introInst0: Installment {installmentNumber} for your purchase at {companyName} is due today (due date: {dueDate}).
closingInst0: Please ensure payment is completed today if possible.
introInstRemainingDays: You have {daysRemaining} calendar day(s) left before installment {installmentNumber} is due (due date: {dueDate}) for your purchase at {companyName}.
closingInstRemainingDays: Please plan your payment before the due date.
introInstOverdue: Installment {installmentNumber} for your purchase at {companyName} is past its due date ({dueDate}).
closingInstOverdue: Please contact your agent or complete payment as soon as possible.
